title: WATCH:  92-year-old vet and caregiver form unlikely bond
fullText: 92-year-old vet and caregiver form unlikely bondABC News' Danny New explains how one man's interaction with a 92-year-old Navy veteran changed his life, and planted the seeds for a lifelong friendship.February 25, 2026
summary: ABC News' Danny New explains how one man's interaction with a 92-year-old Navy veteran changed his life, and planted the seeds for a lifelong friendship.
